https://openalex.org/W4400024098.sample_size: 384 Delphi participants (321 in both rounds); 31 consensus-meeting experts
https://openalex.org/W4400024098.demographics: Scientists, journal editors, and research funders (international)
https://openalex.org/W4400024098.kf1: Developed CONSORT-SPI 2018, extending 9 CONSORT 2010 items and adding a stakeholder-involvement item, to improve transparent reporting of social/psychological intervention RCTs.

https://openalex.org/W4400024048.demographics: Behavioural and social scientists, journal editors, funders (international)
https://openalex.org/W4400024048.kf1: CONSORT-SPI 2018 extends 9 of 25 CONSORT 2010 items and adds a stakeholder-involvement item for reporting social/psychological intervention RCTs.

https://openalex.org/W4407162562.demographics: Teachers in low- and middle-income/conflict-affected settings
https://openalex.org/W4407162562.kf1: Describes development and field testing of CORE, an acceptance-and-commitment-therapy- and SEL-based intervention to improve teacher wellbeing; now ready for feasibility/effectiveness studies.

https://openalex.org/W4407721156.kf1: Reflective career chapter tracing the author's path into developmental psychology and SEL intervention research in conflict-affected settings.

https://openalex.org/W4412941865.intervention_name: In-service teacher training and parental-awareness program
https://openalex.org/W4412941865.demographics: Pre-primary children; teachers; education ministry partners
https://openalex.org/W4412941865.kf1: Reviews a research-practice partnership in Ghana that developed and evaluated teacher-training and parental-awareness programs to improve preprimary quality and school readiness.

https://openalex.org/W4412033923.kf1: Values affirmation had a small effect lowering perceived stereotype threat and improving academic performance, stronger among students reporting fewer initial threats.
https://openalex.org/W4412033923.kf2: Qualitative themes of self-identity growth and friendship predicted better academic performance in the treatment group.

https://openalex.org/W7160414418.kf1: Teacher-reported Working Memory Functioning had a unique bidirectional relationship with academic performance; no other SEL skill showed this pattern.
https://openalex.org/W7160414418.effect_sizes: Multilevel modeling; bidirectional WMF<->academic performance significant

https://openalex.org/W4386030601.demographics: Parents of young children; delivery workforce (health assistants/volunteers)
https://openalex.org/W4386030601.kf1: Delivery quality was generally good (mean 2.36 Bhutan, 2.44 Rwanda of 3); scaling facilitators were institutionalized training/knowledgeable workforce (Bhutan) and strong supervision (Rwanda); barriers were overwork (Bhutan) and volunteer attrition (Rwanda).

https://openalex.org/W4387909691.kf1: Intervention cost US$456/family (projected <US$200 at scale); generated small but efficient improvements in cognitive development per home visit, with co-benefits of reduced violence.

https://openalex.org/W4387439361.kf1: Consensus statement applying an integrative risk-and-resilience model to refugee adolescents' developmental and acculturative tasks and psychological adjustment, with recommendations across ecological contexts.

https://openalex.org/W4387564259.kf1: ADAPT-ITT framework feasibly guided adaptation of the YRI to a peer-delivery model; participatory methods produced modifications (storytelling, metaphor refinement, low-literacy accessibility, attention to gender).

https://openalex.org/W4391514532.intervention_name: Youth Readiness Intervention (YRI) with mobile-based supervision
https://openalex.org/W4391514532.kf1: Protocol to test feasibility, acceptability, cost, and fidelity of mobile- vs. standard supervision for teacher-delivered YRI in Sierra Leone.

https://openalex.org/W4393150756.kf1: Presents three case studies illustrating how the Exploration-Preparation-Implementation-Sustainment (EPIS) framework can be applied in implementation-science research.

https://openalex.org/W4404831830.kf1: YRI was successfully culturally adapted for conflict-affected Colombian youth; testing showed significant improvements in emotion regulation and functional impairment and high acceptability.

https://openalex.org/W4393971121.demographics: Children/adolescents aged 0-24 in LMICs, including humanitarian settings
https://openalex.org/W4393971121.kf1: 80 studies covering 64 parenting/family interventions; 43 showed evidence of effect on child/adolescent mental health; common active ingredients were caregiver psychoeducation, communication skills, and differential reinforcement.

https://openalex.org/W4400103728.kf1: Essay on the psychological and social suffering of Palestinian children in Gaza living under prolonged occupation, violence, displacement, and blockade.

https://openalex.org/W4404235448.demographics: Health-care/service providers working with ethnic-Nepali Bhutanese American older adults
https://openalex.org/W4404235448.kf1: Providers identified isolation and shifting responsibilities as barriers to older Bhutanese Americans' wellbeing, and storytelling/community events as a facilitator countering isolation.

https://openalex.org/W4409021075.demographics: Younger siblings of children enrolled in Sugira Muryango
https://openalex.org/W4409021075.kf1: No statistically significant spillover effects of Sugira Muryango on younger siblings' temperament (surgency, negative emotionality, orienting).
https://openalex.org/W4409021075.effect_sizes: Surgency B=1.984 p=.24; negative emotionality B=-1.657 p=.36; orienting B=0.551 p=.75

https://openalex.org/W4415266593.kf1: YRI+ENTR cost $305.44/participant (ENTR alone $177.05); ROI 1.01-1.95 for YRI+ENTR and 2.53-6.92 for ENTR alone, with 8.5-fold larger healthcare savings for YRI+ENTR.

https://openalex.org/W4407959055.demographics: People affected by the 2014-16 Ebola Virus Disease outbreak
https://openalex.org/W4407959055.kf1: Most stressors (isolation, rejection, stigma, discrimination) and supports emerged at the community level; spirituality/religion and avoidance were key coping strategies, with notable community resilience despite limited formal support.

https://openalex.org/W4415267035.intervention_name: Family strengthening (multiple family groups) + Virtual TeenAge Health Consultants (TAHC)
https://openalex.org/W4415267035.demographics: US-born children (14-17) of refugee parents and one biological parent
https://openalex.org/W4415267035.kf1: Protocol to adapt/test a combined family-strengthening + peer-mentoring intervention addressing intergenerational trauma among US-born children of refugee parents.

https://openalex.org/W7131241304.kf1: Argues that implementation and systems strengthening are urgently needed to integrate mental-health and psychosocial support across health, education, and social-protection platforms for conflict-affected children.

https://openalex.org/W7148831116.sample_size: 1,518 caregivers (309 with a child 12-36 months with developmental delay)
https://openalex.org/W7148831116.demographics: Caregivers of young children with disabilities/developmental delay
https://openalex.org/W7148831116.caregiver_detail: Caregiver depression; family unity; intimate partner violence
https://openalex.org/W7148831116.kf1: 65% of caregivers of children with disabilities met the cut-off for likely depression; economic hardship, food insecurity, and caregiver illness were risk factors and family unity was protective.
https://openalex.org/W7148831116.effect_sizes: Economic hardship β=0.158; caregiver illness β=0.183; family unity β=-0.013; IPV β=0.306 (all p<0.01)

https://openalex.org/W7147693013.demographics: Male Yazidi former children associated with armed forces/groups (abducted aged 8-14)
https://openalex.org/W7147693013.kf1: 70% of male Yazidi former CAAFAGs had received no mental-health care since captivity; 96.7% acknowledged needing care but only one was seeking it, revealing an MHPSS service gap for males.

https://openalex.org/W4414835189.demographics: Somali Bantu and Bhutanese resettled refugee families
https://openalex.org/W4414835189.kf1: Bhutanese families receiving FSI-R showed greater improvements in parental supervision vs. usual care; responsiveness to community needs supported implementation during COVID-19.

https://openalex.org/W4408884306.demographics: Families eligible for social protection in three rural districts
https://openalex.org/W4408884306.caregiver_detail: Stimulating care; father involvement; harsh discipline; caregiver mental health
https://openalex.org/W4408884306.kf1: Child-protection volunteers delivered SM with high fidelity; embedded trial showed improved home stimulation (d=0.20), learning materials (d=0.37), father involvement (IRR=1.18), reduced harsh discipline (OR=0.34), and improved caregiver mental health (d=-0.13).
https://openalex.org/W4408884306.effect_sizes: Stimulation d=0.20; involvement d=0.37; father IRR=1.18; harsh discipline OR=0.34; dietary diversity d=0.25; caregiver MH d=-0.13; safe water OR=3.14

https://openalex.org/W7131275388.demographics: Children in fragile and conflict-affected settings
https://openalex.org/W7131275388.kf1: Argues responses to children in fragile/conflict settings must move beyond event-based framings to address cumulative and intergenerational adversity.
